name: Western Union
description_short: Houston's Western Union check-cashing at 5202 Almeda Rd offers money transfer and bill payment services during extended hours.
description_long:
The Western Union location at 5202 Almeda Rd stands as a standalone check-cashing center in Houston, serving the local community seven days a week. Located in Houston, TX, this branch maintains consistent operating hours from 8 AM to 9 PM daily, making it accessible for weekday errands and weekend transactions. The straightforward storefront makes it easy to find when you need cash management services in the Almeda Corridor area of Houston.

At this Houston location, you'll find check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services. The staff at 5202 Almeda Rd in Houston can process domestic and international transfers quickly, and the extended hours mean you can often complete transactions after typical bank hours. Call +1 713-529-5922 to confirm current service offerings or ask about rates before visiting.

For Houston residents, this Western Union is convenient when you need to cash checks without banking fees or transfer money internationally. Bring a valid photo ID and the checks or account details you're working with. The service fills a practical niche for quick, accessible financial transactions across Houston.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations in Houston alone, including major retailers like Walgreens, Kroger, Walmart, and Randall's for convenient access
24/7 online money sending capability with in-store pickup available during extended agent hours
Multi-language support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) serving diverse immigrant communities
Real-time transfer tracking allowing customers to monitor their transactions from initiation to pickup
Multiple funding and payout options including online payment, card delivery, prepaid card deposits, and cash pickup
Specialized services beyond basic transfers including mobile top-up, inmate payments, and bill payment functionality
Western Union Rewards loyalty program offering benefits for repeat customers
cons: Transfer fees are not transparently displayed on the website, requiring customers to enter transaction details to discover actual costs
Many agent locations impose maximum payout limits of $300, restricting the size of transactions that can be completed
Service is purely transactional with no credit-building, savings accounts, or financial relationship products
Dependence on retail partner hours means service availability varies by location and cannot guarantee consistent after-hours access despite '24/7 online' claims
No fraud protection or dispute resolution mechanisms are evident on the website, creating uncertainty for customers regarding transaction security
best_for: International migrants and immigrants sending money to family members in home countries
Unbanked and underbanked individuals without traditional bank accounts seeking accessible cash transfer services
Consumers making occasional money transfers who prefer retail convenience over dedicated financial institutions
Customers in underserved communities where Western Union agent locations provide the primary money transfer infrastructure
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants, and international money senders who need accessible, convenient cash transfer services through retail locations. The primary caveat is that it functions as a transaction processor, not a financial institution—there are no savings, credit, or relationship products, and fees are opaque until after entering transaction details. Maximum payout limits at some locations may restrict larger transfers.
services: Online money transfer with in-store pickup at agent locations
Cash pickup at retail agent partners (Walgreens, Kroger, Walmart, etc.)
Money order services at select locations
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
Mobile top-up for prepaid phone accounts
Western Union Prepaid card account enrollment and management
Delivery method updates and payment options management
Western Union Rewards loyalty program membership
meta_description: Western Union at 5202 Almeda Rd, Houston, TX. Check cashing & money transfers, open 8AM-9PM every day.
